name: Star Sign
short_description: Climb to the sky while collecting stars. No matter how many times you fall, don't give up.
detailed_description:
Climb to the sky while collecting countless stars.
Numerous gimmicks will try to knock you down without mercy,
But if you keep going and don't give up, you will reach the top someday.

■Game Features
The game is a game of climbing up while collecting stars scattered in the field.
You can save and stop the game at the starting point and at several other magic circles.
The higher difficulty mode will be opened after the game is cleared.
Additional costumes will be added after the game is cleared depending on the stars obtained (16 costumes in total, including the initial ones).
The availability of gold stars will be reset after clearing the game, but the availability of stars of different colors will continue.
　(If you have already obtained them, they will be placed on the field in a semi-transparent state.)
